subject: [SO] Config Changes for SO to listen to a new DMaap Topic
commit_message:
[SO] Config Changes for SO to listen to a new DMaap Topic

- PNF Addition use case-patch2
- To listen PNF DMaap topics added new Topic PNF_UPDATE

Issue-ID: OOM-3092
Change-ID:I73f97f986a817d423f92f8d36809d0947b8a2506
Signed-off-by: Sreeja Gattagouni <sg00744975@techmahindra.com>

Patch Set 1:

Hi Andreas / Fiachra,
Please check n confirm with this patch whether oom-smoketests will pass for pnf_ready & pnf_update events both.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure AKS 4: Chained-CI build started (pipeline id: 821643538), max time: 24400 seconds

Patch Set 1:

(1 comment)

Hi Fiachra, 

 
Since, we wanted to keep minimal changes in OOM, we have handled entire code in SO side for PNF-addition/deletion.
We've made use of consumerID & group in "bpmn/so-bpmn-infrastructure-common/src/main/java/org/onap/so/bpmn/infrastructure/pnf/dmaap/PnfEventReadyDmaapClient.java" for api calls, and it works well in that note.

Tested end2end flow in Jakarta env.

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6652/ )

Hi Lukasz/Fiachra/Andreas,

We have checked this patch changes in k8s-cluster-Kohn, concurrent changes also have been done in SO (pnfdmaapClient.java src&test files) and pushed. Applications boots up and completes workflow.
Both commits of SO & OOM would be required to run this use case smoothly.

Regards,
SANKET
